---
id: authentication-factors-controller-create
title: "Enroll Factor"
description: "Enrolls an Authentication Factor to be used as an additional factor of authentication. The returned ID should be used to create an authentication Challenge."
sidebar_label: "Enroll Factor"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Enroll Factor"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/auth/factors/enroll"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Enrolls an Authentication Factor to be used as an additional factor of authentication. The returned ID should be used to create an authentication Challenge.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
